Fun stuff. Dragging tremendous ass this morning, send all the uplifting things on discord. Same username.
item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Cake Day - Hair Growth Journey
item.description: It’s my cake day so I can post what I WANT!!! This is where I was last cake day, to today’s cake day - crazy for only one year! I never thought growing out my hair would have such an effect on my mood but it really does. I’ve actually never grown my hair out ever (trans, you see) so this feels like a big ole fun milestone and I’m loving it! Just felt like sharing - do the things that make you happy!
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Flute with two chambers. I'd Unmute
item.dc:creator: OleDoxieDad

item.title: Wildlife conservationist placing baby owls back in their burrow
item.dc:creator: Grogu007

item.title: Holy hell, you all. I think Joe Biden just paid off my student loans. I have been trying to get the public service loan forgiveness for years. I think I'm going to cry. I was going to be paying those bastards until I died. ?
item.description: Thank you, everyone. I'm still in shock. I can actually think about retiring someday. It's insane. BTW I got Pell grants as well. They hardly covered books and parking. Getting Pell grants means you started behind your more affluent peers and these predatory loan servicers do everything in their power to keep you there. Helping people like me is just a bandaid. The whole system is broken. Dark Brandon wouldn't have had to bail us out if they weren't charging outrageous tuitions and killing us with unconscionable interest rates. Thank you for coming to my Ted Talk.
item.dc:creator: Picdump2508

item.dc:creator: countervail247365

item.title: I’m finally a doctor, dammit
item.description:
Nearly six years later, I’m done with my PhD.
I’m still in the disbelief phase that I actually did it
140 pages of dissertation brought to you be regular naps and snuggle sessions with the dogs
Dog tax.
This old man has put up with this entire journey and is probably more thrilled that it’s over than I am
item.dc:creator: tinyvalkyrie

item.dc:creator: Onlyhereforthelaughs

item.title: Backlogged memes (depression, tiddies, and then horror, somehow)
item.description:
It’s 8am on a Saturday (for Americans anyway), who’s ready for memes about sex and also some about depression just to keep it spicy
This happened today. Kiddo wanted to go outside…just a quick walk to the park I said…bam, grocery store. And it’s never for the three things I say it’s gonna be.
How can u not be depressed in this capitalist hellscape Although I switched meds and moved countries and that helped quite a bit
Yeah I love sitting still, it stopped me from getting diagnosed for a WHILE
Instead of all this that is proven to work…have you tried…masturbation
Burn
I seem to be a freezer mostly which is inconvenient
I love a good meme that supports anarchy and the end of capitalism
Sure why not. I mean there are ten million reasons why not including hygiene and violence and transportation and some of y’all’s trash taste in men and the only reason TO do it is just because it seems fun but I’m ace so I am biased
This witch gives lesbian vibes and that is exactly my type
So true. My parents are flying overseas soon and im tempted to be like hello welcome to Germany here’s your grandson ok bye we’re going to the biggest spa in the world
This guy gets it
Is that thing made out of rebar?? You know what, I think it might work, yes
Most women I know get really wired after actually. The baby point really only makes it worse because like. Bro you barely did anything. Why you so tired. (And who tf is this girl with, 2-3 times???)
Amazing. A true friend.
I will always appreciate depictions of sailors just getting their shit wrecked by pissed off mermaids
It really do be like that. Like when you have a shitty phone that only charges to 15%
In the moment it really seemed like this didn’t apply to me, but looking back yeah it’s all very accurate
Marie Kondo told me to do it your honor
I used to. Now I kinda do my own thing. But I also found better friends.
Fair
When I walked into daycare to get my kid they were all blasting Shania Twain while they danced around and picked up toys. I think I picked a good place
Let’s go faeries i don’t have all fuckin day (although it could also be chainsaw massacre guy)
Then lick your vagina, meridith
……..fair
Not sure which is the he but in my Headcanon the blue is the woman which makes it so much funnier
I made this accurate.
I can be talking about two things
These are the whitest people I’ve ever seen so that is quite accurate yes
I’d love to be a swamp creature. I already kind of am. I had gators in my backyard growing up
Texas: usually something racist or just super graphically violent Yankees: something in your basement because you dummies have fucking basements like you’re just asking to be eaten by monsters. Also your attics are creepier.
Mood. Drop some horror recs below plz I love shitty horror movies and also good ones It’s actually kind of weird how many old house horrors there are set in America when like. Nothing in America is old. The cobblestones outside my house in Germany are from like the 1400s.
They have a free Mario kart app btw it’s super fun
I mean I just finished supernatural and in that show they always do.
Jean Claude van Hamm
Doctors irl when the patient has an illness that is both reasonable and testable: you’re just fat
Gamer dudes are usually pretty nice irl. Online tho….. well. There’s a reason I usually play solo.
Clearly they’re the same person
OMG IT IS SO TINY I want a kitten now. Or perhaps another baby.
Hear me out: parents that give two shits. Let’s start with that.
Yeah that’s about right. I think my MASH when I was in 8th grade had me in a mansion with Justin Timberlake. Even back then I was like…am I supposed to be chill with that or can I just go live in the woods
Both very much needed. All of my books, by the way, are excellent weapons in a pinch!
I think I’m supposed to add the suicide hotline or something here. And say something about how it gets better. But it feels kind of disingenuous. I mean it does get better, and like…the casino will close eventually, might as well use the chips you have until they run out. But I generally hate people so that’s all I got. Tschüss, buddies
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious

item.dc:creator: RedCamaro

item.title: Saturday wholesome dump of spring flowers (no politics)
item.description:
1
2. Let's roll mfs
3
4
5. Always
6. I halps
7
8. There is at least one, if not we are here for you : )
9. Spring is awesome
10. Motal Kombat lady
11
12
13. The Bloomster
14. That smile : )
15. Thank you for making it to the end of the dump. Hope it made you smile at last once. It's a please for me to share that I'm working on a game of mine. It's a comedy game, partly inspired by The Stanley Parable. If you want to help out with a wishlist it will make my day: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Happy spring everyone! :)
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Disney Dump 5: The Empire Strikes Back
item.description:
1 - https://imgur.com/gallery/9UndrE0 2 - https://imgur.com/gallery/aH4AocL 3 - https://imgur.com/gallery/mT8hlzS 4 - https://imgur.com/gallery/H0SRJlj
Jodi Benson - The Little Mermaid
The old racist bastard (and his toadie Nelson Peltz) lost in their attempted boardroom blitz https://variety.com/2024/biz/news/disney-shareholder-meeting-vote-official-reject-peltz-1235958254/
Lillias White, Cheryl Freeman, LaChanze, Roz Ryan and Vanéese Y. Thomas (The Muses) - Hercules
Ed Kemmer from the early 50s TV show "Space Patrol" served as the live action model for Prince Phillip, especially during the intense scenes battling the dragon.
And me of course living in the totality (but whenever anything astronomical happens I get screwed over by the weather)
https://nitter.net/pikeunjoo/status/1691904536233791846#m
Sauce: https://www.clairehummel.com https://clairehummel.artstation.com https://www.deviantart.com/shoomlah https://twitter.com/shoomlah https://www.instagram.com/shoomlah
Mary is the last surviving voice actress of the three Disney Princesses created in Walt Disney's lifetime (as well as the last surviving castmember of the original film). https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k_o1H_g-pGk
They're as big a fan of the Owl House as I am and they made an extraordinary Edalyn Clawthorne costume (in her anime, ahh... Harpy form).
https://twitter.com/kianamaiart/status/1375036368053694470
Thurl Ravenscroft and other actors recording Grim Grinning Ghosts for the Haunted Mansion, as the singing busts in the cemetary (a trick illusion projects their faces onto fake heads).
Raya and the Last Dragon (2021) - Sisu
